allow: Bash(sqlite3 data/hazards.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM hazards; SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM imports; SELECT filename, row_count, imported_at FROM imports ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/hazards.db "SELECT DISTINCT hazard_category FROM hazards WHERE hazard_category<>'' ORDER BY hazard_category")
Bash(sqlite3 data/hazards.db "SELECT DISTINCT hazard_level FROM hazards WHERE hazard_level<>'' ORDER BY hazard_level")
Bash(sqlite3 data/hazards.db "SELECT hazard_level,COUNT\(*\) FROM hazards GROUP BY hazard_level ORDER BY COUNT\(*\) DESC")
Bash(sqlite3 data/hazards.db "SELECT check_unit,COUNT\(*\) FROM hazards GROUP BY check_unit ORDER BY COUNT\(*\) DESC")
Bash(sqlite3 data/hazards.db "SELECT hazard_category,COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM hazards WHERE hazard_category<>'' GROUP BY hazard_category ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20")
